ImageDescription.value:
Samuele (born Antonio Francesco ) Marzorati (Biumo Inferiore, 10 September 1670 - Gondar , 3 March 1716 ) was a an Italian Franciscan priest, missionary in Ethiopia where he suffered the stoning together with the brothers Liberato Weiss and Michele Pio Fasoli. He was declared a martyr and was beatified by Pope John Paul II in 1988.

Source: Wikipedia
